perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a young woman applying a white, heart-shaped collagen patch to her cheek, displaying a surprised facial expression. (2) She transitions to showing several purple-packaged skincare boxes. (3) A sequence follows demonstrating a multi-step application: spraying a purple mist, applying white patches to the cheeks and forehead, showing them dissolve into the skin, and finally peeling off a mesh backing. (4) Multiple close-ups highlight the resulting glow on her skin. (5) She is then seen applying various creams and serums to her hand and face. (6) A transition occurs to a talking-head shot where she holds the products and points to promotional text and product flyers that overlay the screen. (7) Before-and-after comparison photos of her face are shown briefly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with an energetic, high-pitched female voice speaking Mandarin Chinese over an upbeat, fast-tempo electronic background track. (2) As the product demonstration begins, the vocal tone remains enthusiastic and persuasive, punctuated by 'ting' and 'sparkle' sound effects when results are shown. (3) The background music remains consistent in volume as the speaker transitions into a more informational tone regarding pricing and availability towards the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: "韓國&美國 紅到不行？" (Korea & USA so popular?), "一貼就融化的膠原蛋白貼片？" (A collagen patch that melts when applied?). (2) Step-by-step numbers: "1. 先噴專用的膠原噴霧..." (1. First spray special collagen mist...), "2. 打開包裝..." (2. Open packaging...), "3. 貼上去" (3. Apply it), "4. 膠原蛋白會慢慢融化" (4. Collagen will slowly melt). (3) Result description: "燈泡肌~!" (Light bulb skin!). (4) Promotional details: "12/11~12/15 只開五天" (Dec 11-15, only open 5 days), "3D貼片套組 目前只有90組" (3D patch set, only 90 sets currently), prices like "$3,119元". (5) CTA: "購買連結在我的IG主頁" (Purchase link in my IG bio).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product Demo -> Result Evidence -> Promotion/Offer -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female influencer throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair. She wears a pink top in the demo segments and a grey/white patterned cardigan in the talking segments. She has a polished, glowing makeup look.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Simple indoor settings with plain light-colored walls or curtains, typical of a beauty vlog setup.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and sell the BOH Bioheal collagen skin care line through a tutorial and a limited-time group buy offer. The video aims to convince viewers of the product's effectiveness by showing the 'melting' mechanism and subsequent skin glow, then providing a clear path to purchase with a discount.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product demonstration, mention of brand names (BOH), pricing graphics, and a call to action for a group buy link.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-intensity energy and fast-paced editing typical of Taiwanese beauty influencers on Instagram/TikTok.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses visual 'evidence' like the patch melting and skin-before/after shots to build trust rapidly in a short format.
